title: Update README with Author Name
description: Add the author's name to the root README file to provide project attribution and contact information.
details: Open the root README.md file in the repository. Add a clearly visible 'Author' section near the top or bottom of the document. Include the author's full name and, if appropriate, a contact email or GitHub profile link. Ensure the formatting matches the existing style of the README (e.g., use Markdown headings and bullet points as appropriate).
test_strategy: Visually inspect the README.md file to confirm the author's name appears in the correct section and is formatted consistently with the rest of the document. Optionally, run Markdown linting tools to ensure formatting compliance.
